form.formComment: Recent form sound. Returns from a 34-day let-up. Last start made some head-way from midfield; 2nd of 11 at this track on March 8 over 1700m, on a slow track; 0.5 len behind Shining Road with 51.5kg at $1.40. The race before that favourite; came from midfield and won by 2.5 len at this track February 1 over 1400m defeating Mighty Beat carrying 53.5kg at $1.70. Poised to win after a narrow defeat last time.
